name: Gibbons And Reed Employees
description_short: Gibbons & Reed Employees Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution in Salt Lake City serving primarily Gibbons & Reed company employees with auto loans, personal loans, and credit card services.
description_long:
Gibbons & Reed Employees Federal Credit Union operates as a federally chartered credit union headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah. The institution was established to serve the financial needs of Gibbons & Reed employees, operating on the cooperative principle where members are both owners and customers. As a credit union, it functions differently from traditional banks, returning profits to members through better rates and lower fees.

The credit union offers tailored financial products including auto loans and personal loans to its members. They provide credit card solutions and maintain a full suite of member services through their main office at 1000 N Warm Springs Rd, Salt Lake City, UT 84116. The institution accepts bill payments through third-party platforms like doxo, enabling flexible payment options for members including credit card, debit card, Apple Pay, and bank account transfers.

As a specialized employee credit union, Gibbons & Reed distinguishes itself through its focus on serving a specific employee population rather than the general public. This targeted membership model allows them to develop products and services specifically aligned with the needs and circumstances of Gibbons & Reed employees. Their membership-based structure means decision-making and profit distribution prioritize member benefits over shareholder returns.

The credit union maintains reasonable accessibility with phone support at 801-322-4010 and email support at admin@grcreditunion.com during business hours. However, as an employee credit union, membership eligibility is restricted to Gibbons & Reed employees and potentially their families, limiting accessibility compared to community credit unions. The institution's online presence through grcreditunion.com provides basic information, though comprehensive service details require direct contact.
services: Bill payment processing through doxo platform
In-person service at Salt Lake City headquarters
Flexible payment methods including debit/credit cards
pros: Member-owned credit union structure returns profits to members through better rates and lower fees
Specialized focus on Gibbons & Reed employees allows tailored financial products and services
Auto loans and personal loans available specifically designed for member needs
Free bill payment option available through linked bank account via doxo platform
Local presence in Salt Lake City with physical office for in-person service
Multiple payment methods accepted including credit/debit cards, Apple Pay, and bank transfers
Direct phone support available at 801-322-4010 for billing questions
cons: Membership restricted to Gibbons & Reed employees only, making access unavailable to general public
Limited online banking information available; requires phone/email contact for comprehensive service details
Service area appears limited to Utah based on available documentation
No evidence of extended service hours or 24/7 customer support availability
Payment processing through third-party doxo platform may introduce additional steps compared to direct credit union payment systems
best_for: Gibbons & Reed company employees seeking employee-focused credit union services
Employees needing auto loans with rates potentially better than traditional banks
Employees looking for personal loans from a member-owned financial institution
Workers preferring credit union membership structure that prioritizes member benefits
diagnosis: Gibbons & Reed Employees Federal Credit Union is best for active Gibbons & Reed employees seeking competitively priced auto and personal loans through a member-owned institution. The primary limitation is that membership eligibility is restricted to company employees, making this credit union inaccessible to the general public.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
